creator: lgfbsd@be-well.ilk.org
text:
rezound defines the soundtouch libraries as a build dependency, but
they are actually a run dependency too.

Fix: 

I think the right fix is to change soundtouch from being in
BUILD_DEPENDS to being in LIB_DEPENDS.
How-To-Repeat: 
build rezound with soundtouch enabled (which is the default), then remove the soundtouch port.  rezound will not run.
